name: @fecommunity/reactpress-plugins
description: ReactPress plugin registry — local and npm plugin sources for the publishing platform

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-hello-world run build && pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-seo run build && pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-image-optimizer run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-hello-world run typecheck && pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-seo run typecheck && pnpm --filter @fecommunity/reactpress-plugin-image-optimizer run typecheck
